title: Cloudflare (NET) Q1 2023 Earnings Review
text: Cloudflare Q1 2023 revenue reached $290.2M, up 36.8% year-over-year with sequential growth of 5.6% above Q4 2022. Full-year 2023 guidance was reduced to $1.280B-$1.284B (31.4% growth) from prior $1.330B-$1.342B (37.0% growth). Non-GAAP gross margin was 77.8% (up from 77.4% in Q4), with non-GAAP operating income of $19.4M (6.7% of revenue) compared to $4.9M year-ago. Non-GAAP net income was $27.2M ($0.08 per share). Free cash flow reached $13.9M (4.8% margin). Total paying customers were 168k (up 13% annually), with large customers ($100k+ annualized) reaching 2,156 (up 40.3% year-over-year). Dollar-based net retention rate was 117% (down from 127% year-ago). Management faced unprecedented sales cycle elongation in March 2023 coinciding with banking sector turbulence. Expansion deals with existing customers experienced 49% longer cycles than the prior four-quarter average. Despite headwinds, positive signals emerged with Act 2 and Act 3 products contributing over 25% of customer annual contract value. The company achieved record sales pipeline generation for three consecutive quarters and expanded Fortune 1000 penetration with six of the top 10 global companies as customers.
